_comments.rateLimitExempt/moderation_test: moderation_test is a dev/demo endpoint that returns mock Hive scores; it has no auth guard but is intentionally public for local testing only — do NOT expose in production without adding requireAuth
_comments.authGuardExempt/moderation-test-proxy: moderation-test-proxy is protected by cryptographic JWT verification + admin role check inside the handler (proxy_moderation_test.function.ts); exempt here because auth is handled in-function, not by the route guard middleware
